# Deep Vortex AI Image Generator

> Generate stunning high-quality AI images from text prompts. Supports multiple aspect ratios for any use case. Professional results in seconds.

## URL

https://images.deepvortexai.art/

## About

The Deep Vortex AI Image Generator uses cutting-edge AI models to create high-resolution images from text descriptions. Enter a prompt, select your aspect ratio, and receive a professional-quality AI image instantly.

Part of the Deep Vortex AI ecosystem: https://deepvortexai.art

## Features

- Text-to-image generation using advanced AI models
- Multiple aspect ratios: 1:1 (square), 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (portrait/mobile), 4:3, 3:4
- High-resolution output
- Instant download
- Favorites gallery (cloud-saved)
- Aspect ratio selector for any platform
- Quick idea prompts for inspiration

## Use Cases

- Digital art and illustrations
- Social media content (Instagram, Twitter, TikTok)
- YouTube thumbnails (16:9)
- Mobile wallpapers (9:16)
- Blog and article headers
- Concept art and mood boards
- Marketing visuals
- Background images

## How to Use

1. Go to https://images.deepvortexai.art/
2. Sign in or create a free account (2 free credits included)
3. Enter a detailed text description of your desired image
4. Select your preferred aspect ratio
5. Click Generate
6. Download or save to Favorites

## Example Prompts (effective for this tool)

- "Cosmic nebula explosion vibrant colors deep space photorealistic"
- "Ancient dragon soaring above mystical glowing mountain castle"
- "Ethereal goddess with silver hair enchanted forest golden light"
- "Futuristic cyberpunk robot neon city rain night cinematic"
- "Massive ocean wave crashing dramatic stormy sky epic"
- "Majestic lion portrait golden savanna sunset dramatic lighting"
- "Snow capped mountain reflection crystal lake misty morning"
- "Mystical wizard casting spell ancient ruins swirling energy"

## Pricing

- 2 free credits on account creation
- 1 credit per image generated
- Credit packs: Starter (10), Basic (30), Popular (75), Pro (150), Ultimate (350)
- Payments via Stripe

## API

- Generation endpoint: POST /api/generate (authenticated, requires JWT + prompt + aspectRatio)
- Favorites endpoint: GET/POST /api/favorites (authenticated)
- Authentication: Supabase JWT

## Related Tools

- AI Emoticon Generator: https://emoticons.deepvortexai.art/
- Deep Vortex AI Hub: https://deepvortexai.art
